body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
ClimaLand almost always uses the name `context` for the communications context, but there are a few places we have `comms_ctx`. This PR renames them all to `context`.

This is a breaking change because it changes some Domain kwargs. Now is a good time to merge it in since we'll need our next release to be minor after https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/pull/1184
title: uniformly use `context` throughout ClimaLand
